name: axiom-mcp-engineering
description: Engineering MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers as production-grade agent interfaces — tool API surface design, idempotency and atomic claim semantics under agent retry, structured error envelopes agents can recover from, schema versioning across model drift, transport reliability (stdio framing, HTTP), output-shape discipline (pagination, truncation, summary vs detail), the four MCP primitives (tools / resources / prompts / sampling), composition across multiple servers, observability of tool calls, and testing via golden conversations. Two roles (architect / critic) over one shared corpus. Router + 13 sheets (scaffold; v0.1.0 ships router only). Discipline pack — applies wherever you ship an MCP server agents will retry, drift against, and operate concurrently.
